title: Marketeers out there, what's your superpower?
excerpt:

posts.author: jaimy (Jaimy @Tracket)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all!

I’ve recently been using monday more and more to schedule the progress, schedule and publication of my content (coming from hubspots/salesforce). The current team I’m working with is heavily invested in monday and starting to love it myself as well.

So for the marketeers out there, how do you use your content calendar/publication within monday? What tips, tricks, automations do you use that are not very obvious?
